content.cn_text: 你将听到一名男子分享他参加海岛旅行的经历。
content.en_text: You will hear a man, sharing his experiences with the oceanic island travelling.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间查看第11至第17题。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions 11 to 17.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答第11至第17题。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 11 to 17.

content.cn_text: 大家好，我叫 Damon，我想分享一下我的海岛旅行经历。
content.en_text: Hello, my name is Damon and I would like to share my experiences of oceanic island travelling.

content.cn_text: 首先，有些人一直在问我，海岛旅行项目如何让
content.en_text: First of all, some of you have been asking me how oceanic island travelling keeps its

content.cn_text: 旅行团成员在旅途中及时了解最新信息。
content.en_text: tour group members updated while they are on the travel trip.

content.cn_text: 请注意，信息板每天都会更新，我们鼓励你们每天早上查看，
content.en_text: Please note that the information board is updated daily and we encourage you to check

content.cn_text: 然后再开始一天的活动，无论是在海滩、小屋，还是参加
content.en_text: it every morning before you begin your day on the beach in the cottage or participating

content.cn_text: 各种活动，所以请记得在接待处查看信息板，
content.en_text: in any of the many activities offered, so please remember to check it at the reception

content.cn_text: 它位于度假村游客中心前面的区域。
content.en_text: area in the front of the visitor centre of the resort.

content.cn_text: 你们可能已经知道，我们的旅行提供许多不同的活动。
content.en_text: You are probably aware of the many different activities offered on our trips.

content.cn_text: 在预订前，有些事情你们需要了解。
content.en_text: There is something you should know before booking.

content.cn_text: 大多数活动不需要预订，比如沙滩足球、沙滩排球，甚至
content.en_text: Reservations are not necessary for most activities, such as sand soccer, beach volleyball and even

content.cn_text: 水肺潜水。
content.en_text: scuba diving.

content.cn_text: 不过，如果你计划参加我们的滑水活动，我们建议你
content.en_text: However, if you are planning to participate in our water skiing activity, we encourage

content.cn_text: 至少提前48小时预订，因为我们会聘请外部团队来
content.en_text: you to book that activity at least 48 hours beforehand as we hire an outside group to

content.cn_text: 组织这项活动，需要提前通知他们参加人数。
content.en_text: conduct this activity and we need to notify them of how many participants will be involved.

content.cn_text: 游客可以参加的众多活动之一是神秘洞穴游。
content.en_text: One of the many activities available to the guests is the Mystery Cave Tour.

content.cn_text: 一些有兴趣参加这类游览的人不知道票价
content.en_text: Some people interested in participating in those tours don't know what the ticket

content.cn_text: 包含什么。
content.en_text: price includes.

content.cn_text: 票价包含前往洞穴的交通。
content.en_text: The ticket price includes transportation to the caves.

content.cn_text: 所有参加者在洞穴内都必须佩戴安全头盔，而票价已经
content.en_text: All participants are required to wear a safety helmet inside the caves and the ticket has

content.cn_text: 包含了这项费用。
content.en_text: covered that for you.

content.cn_text: 如果参加这项游览，你需要穿舒适的鞋子，因为
content.en_text: If you are joining this tour, you will need to wear some comfortable shoes as there will

content.cn_text: 这项游览会涉及一些步行。
content.en_text: be some walking involved with this tour.

content.cn_text: 如果你想在旅行前查看神秘洞穴的地图，可以
content.en_text: If you are interested to see a map of the Mystery Cave in advance of your trip, you can

content.cn_text: 在 Oceanic Island Travelling 网站上查看。
content.en_text: see it on the Oceanic Island Travelling website.

content.cn_text: 当然，如果你在游览中需要洞穴地图，我们也会提供，
content.en_text: Of course, we will offer you a map of the cave if you need it during the tour, but it

content.cn_text: 但需要额外付费。
content.en_text: will cost an extra fee.

content.cn_text: 对于有兴趣参观 Davison Wildlife Park 的人，你们应该知道，
content.en_text: For those of you interested in visiting the Davison Wildlife Park, you should know that

content.cn_text: 这个公园是非常适合家庭的地方。
content.en_text: the park is an excellent site for families.

content.cn_text: 虽然它也确实吸引许多动物学家前来做研究。
content.en_text: Although it does attract a lot of zoologists to do some research.

content.cn_text: 同样，前往公园的交通包含在票价中。
content.en_text: Again, transportation to the park is included in your ticket price.

content.cn_text: 请注意，12岁及以下儿童可以享受折扣票价。
content.en_text: And please note that children aged 12 and under receive a discounted ticket price.

content.cn_text: 在野生动物园里，孩子们通常可以观看大象表演，这确实很吸引人，
content.en_text: In the wildlife park, children can often watch elephant shows which are really an attraction,

content.cn_text: 但现在有些大象生病了，需要时间恢复。
content.en_text: but now some elephants are ill and they need some time to recover.

content.cn_text: 不过，还有另一项活动应该会让孩子们开心。
content.en_text: Still, there is another activity that should entertain kids.

content.cn_text: 他们可以喂动物。
content.en_text: They are allowed to feed the animals.

content.cn_text: 这项活动非常受孩子们欢迎。
content.en_text: This activity is extremely popular with kids.

content.cn_text: 动物园里最受欢迎的动物之一是红袋鼠群。
content.en_text: Among the most popular animals at the zoo are the collection of red kangaroos.

content.cn_text: 这些袋鼠的体型和黑熊差不多，但通常来说，它们
content.en_text: The size of these kangaroos is similar to that of black bears, but generally, they are

content.cn_text: 比成年人还大；如果幸运的话，你甚至可能看到一些小袋鼠。
content.en_text: bigger than adults, and if you are lucky, you might even be able to see some baby kangaroos

content.cn_text: 在参观期间看到。
content.en_text: while you are visiting.

content.cn_text: 鳄鱼在野生动物园里也非常受欢迎。
content.en_text: The crocodiles are also very popular at the wildlife park.

content.cn_text: 这些史前动物的寿命超过50年。
content.en_text: These prehistoric animals have a lifespan of over 50 years.

content.cn_text: 雄性鳄鱼甚至可以活到80岁。
content.en_text: A male crocodile can even be expected to live to the age of 80.

content.cn_text: 你不能像接近公园里其他一些动物那样靠近鳄鱼，
content.en_text: You won't get as close to the crocodiles as you will to some of the other animals in

content.cn_text: 因为它们有一定危险性。
content.en_text: the park as they are somewhat dangerous.

content.cn_text: 你可以从远处观察它们在自然栖息地中的样子。
content.en_text: You will be able to view these animals from a distance in their natural habitats.

content.cn_text: 在听讲座剩余部分之前，你有一些时间查看第18至第20题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the talk, you have some time to look at questions 18-20.

content.cn_text: 现在请听，并回答第18至第20题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 18-20.

content.cn_text: 对于以前参加过这项旅行的人，请注意，过去一些
content.en_text: For those of you that have previously participated in this tour, please know that some of the

content.cn_text: 曾经提供的活动现在已经不再提供，并已被
content.en_text: activities which were previously available are no longer available and have been replaced

content.cn_text: 新的活动取代。
content.en_text: with new activities.

content.cn_text: 烧烤和篝火现在因当地防火规定而受到限制，
content.en_text: The barbecue and the bonfire are now restricted by ordinance due to fire precautions in

content.cn_text: 因为该地区需要防范火灾。
content.en_text: the area.

content.cn_text: 我们的多数游客不再去山上徒步，而是更喜欢参观当地许多
content.en_text: Instead of going hiking on the hills, most of our tourists prefer to visit many of the

content.cn_text: 礼品店，为自己或没有参加旅行的家人朋友购买纪念品。
content.en_text: gift shops in the area to buy souvenirs for themselves or for family and friends who

content.cn_text: 为没有参加旅行的人购买。
content.en_text: are not on the tour.

content.cn_text: 鸸鹋农场以前是一个受欢迎的参观点，但现在暂时关闭，
content.en_text: The EMU Farm, which has previously been a popular place to visit, is now temporarily closed

content.cn_text: 暂停营业。
content.en_text: for business.

content.cn_text: 不过，现在新推出了一项很受欢迎的 Nelson 奶酪工厂之旅，
content.en_text: But, newly available to you is a popular trip offered to the Nelson cheese factory in

content.cn_text: 游客可以参观并了解奶酪制作的全过程。
content.en_text: which visitors can take a tour and learn all about the process of manufacturing cheese.

content.cn_text: 最后，参观 St. John's Fruit Farm 是另一个非常受欢迎的一日游。
content.en_text: And finally, a visit to the St. John's Fruit Farm is another very popular day trip.

content.cn_text: 这个水果农场距离我们的小屋步行可达，这次你们可以乘小巴前往，
content.en_text: The fruit farm is within walking distance of our cottages and you can get there by minibus

content.cn_text: 不过将来会有几条经过小屋的自然步道。
content.en_text: this time, but will have a few nature trails that go past the cottages in the future.

content.cn_text: 在农场里，你们可以在果园和田地里采摘草莓和苹果。
content.en_text: At the farm, you will be able to pick strawberries and apples in the farm's orchards and fields.

content.cn_text: 许多游客都非常喜欢这项活动。
content.en_text: Many tourists enjoy this activity a lot.

content.cn_text: 这个地区没有山地徒步，但我们确实有前往其他目的地的旅行。
content.en_text: We don't have hill hiking in the area, but we do have tours that involve in other destinations.

content.cn_text: 如果你感兴趣，可以联系我。
content.en_text: Contact me if you are interested.

content.cn_text: 第二部分到此结束。
content.en_text: That is the end of section 2.

content.cn_text: 现在你有半分钟检查答案。
content.en_text: You now have half a minute to check your answers.

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.
groups.title: Questions 11–13

items.title: Where is the information board?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第11题问信息板在哪里。原文说 check it at the reception area，所以答案是 A. At the reception。

items.title: Which sport do customers have to book in advance?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第12题问哪项运动必须提前预订。原文说 water skiing activity 要 book at least 48 hours beforehand，所以答案是 B. Water-skiing。

items.title: What does the cave tour ticket price include
items.analysis: 答案解析：第13题问洞穴游票价包含什么。原文说 safety helmet inside the caves and the ticket has covered that，所以答案是 C. Safety helmet；鞋子需要自己穿，地图要额外收费。

groups.desc: Fill in the blank with no more than 3 words and/or a number.
groups.title: Questions 14–17

items.title: Davison Wildlife Park is a great place for 14. _________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第14题问 Davison Wildlife Park 是适合谁的好地方。原文说 an excellent site for families，所以答案是 families。

items.title: Children are allowed to 15. ________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第15题问孩子们被允许做什么。原文说 They are allowed to feed the animals，所以答案是 feed the animals。

items.title: Red kangaroos are larger than 16. _______
items.analysis: 答案解析：第16题问红袋鼠比什么更大。原文说 they are bigger than adults，所以答案是 adults。

items.title: Crocodiles can live for at least 17. ________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第17题问鳄鱼至少可以活多久。原文说 have a lifespan of over 50 years，所以答案是 50 years。

groups.source_collect:
Fill in the blank with no more than 3 words and/or a number.
• Davison Wildlife Park is a great place for $14$
• Children are allowed to $15$
• Red kangaroos are larger than $16$
• Crocodiles can live for at least $17$

groups.desc:
Choose THREE correct answers.
Which THREE activities are popular now for tourists in inland region?
groups.title: Questions 18–20

items.title: Which THREE activities are popular now for tourists in inland region?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第18题为三选题之一，问现在内陆地区受欢迎的活动。原文说游客 prefer to visit gift shops to buy souvenirs，对应 G. buying souvenirs。

items.title: Which THREE activities are popular now for tourists in inland region?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第19题为三选题之一，问现在内陆地区受欢迎的活动。原文说 newly available is a popular trip to the Nelson cheese factory，对应 B. visiting cheese factory。

items.title: Which THREE activities are popular now for tourists in inland region?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第20题为三选题之一，问现在内陆地区受欢迎的活动。原文说 at the farm, you will be able to pick strawberries and apples，并且 many tourists enjoy this activity，所以对应 C. fruit picking。
